title: Roasted British Fennel Sausages Italian Sausage Yorkshire Pudding
description: A comforting dish featuring Italian fennel sausages, roasted to perfection in a Yorkshire pudding, served with a rich beurre-monte sauce.
instructions: Whisk together the flour, eggs, salt, and black pepper in a large bowl.
Gradually add the milk, whisking until smooth.
Add the melted butter, whisking until fully incorporated.
Transfer the batter to a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
Arrange the Italian fennel sausages on top of the batter.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the Yorkshire pudding is golden brown and puffed.
While the Yorkshire pudding is baking, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and fennel fronds, cooking for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
Add the Italian fennel sausages to the skillet, cooking for 2-3 minutes, or until browned.
Transfer the sausages to a plate, reserving the skillet.
To make the beurre-monte, melt 2 tablespoons of butter in the reserved skillet over medium heat.
Add the remaining 6 tablespoons of butter, whisking until fully incorporated and melted.
Season the beurre-monte with salt and black pepper to taste.
Split the Yorkshire pudding in half lengthwise, spooning the beurre-monte sauce over the top.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped parsley.
